messages.content: Are you on the Kailua site tomorrow.
Yes morning shift. Why
Irrigation schedule. I'll check the system.
You know the property manager at Hale Nalu right. I want to pitch his neighborhood HOA for residential landscaping. Can you send me his number.
Oh hmm let me look into that
I think theres some policy about sharing client contacts for outside stuff
Ok.
Mike said the mower is back at the shop.
Again? Third time this month
Did you find out about that Kailua contact.
Its residential not resort work. Totally separate.
I know. Still trying to figure out the best way to handle it
Did you get that Kailua number.
Not yet. Been slammed with holiday planting schedules
lol
lol ok
ya
mr whiskers says hi
sleeping now
gn hermanito
took mr whiskers to the vet today
How's the little guy doing hermana
hes great. 6 years old and the vet said hes in perfect health
all his shots updated, heart sounds good, teeth look good
That's great news. I know you worry about that cat
hes the one thing thats easy right now lol
Pues he's a good cat. Best decision you made going to the humane society
he really is. I needed something to come home to after ernesto
I remember hermana. You and that cat saved each other ya sabes
oh I also asked keoni about cat sitting today. for whenever I go somewhere
That's smart mija. You need someone reliable for that
his neighbor does pet sitting so thats one less thing to figure out
Good. One less thing to worry about when you do take a trip hermana
on it
tmrw
tomas you up
Si hermana what's going on
I need to tell you about this thing vernon did
so he sends out the crew rotation
for next week right
except he cc'd the operations director on it
totally normal
same thing ive been getting every week
The operations director? For a weekly crew schedule?
yes!! derek tanaka. the ops director. cc'd on a routine crew rotation email
same kind of email
ive been getting for 12 years
and now the big boss is on the cc
Mija he's just trying to show his boss he's organized. That's what new managers do ya sabes
I know
but it makes me feel like were being watched
like he doesnt trust us to do our jobs
and now every time I send a schedule update
im wondering
is derek reading this too
Pues hermana I guarantee you Derek Tanaka has better things to do than read crew rotation emails. He probably gets a hundred of those a day
maybe
but vernon doesnt know that
hes doing it to look good
not because it helps anyone
12 years tomas. nobody ever cc'd the ops director on my crew schedules. not once
I know hermana. He's three months in and he's still figuring out what he doesn't need to manage. Give him time, and if he doesn't figure it out pues that's his problem not yours
Marisol sent me a homework assignment lol
What kind of homework hermana
a whole document checklist
insurance policy bank statements property inventory
Pues that's what happens when you have a paralegal in the family mija. She's going to make sure everything is done right
roth IRA statement too
she wants it all by end of december
I know shes right
its just a lot
Start with the easy stuff. Bank statements you can print tonight ya sabes
I looked at the list and was like
ok where do I even start
ya probably this weekend
the insurance policy
I think its in the filing cabinet
with ernestos stuff
Take your time with it hermana. But don't let it sit too long either. Marisol's right that you need this done
happy thanksgiving
feliz dia mija
hey tomas you know what rosas kids are into these days
Christmas shopping already hermana?
its december! I always send them something
Si you're right. Ok let me think
Sofia is big into art. She's doing pottery now at school
thats cute. what about diego
All basketball. Reminds me of Ernesto actually
haha ya ernesto would have loved that
Camila is the tricky one. She's into drawing her own little comic books ya sabes
like manga stuff?
She makes her own stories. Rosa says she fills up entire notebooks
ok so art stuff for sofia, basketball for diego, drawing stuff for camila
amazon has good pottery kits and basketball gear
theres a gift shop on king street
beautiful sketchbooks
hawaiian art on the covers
Mija that's a nice touch. Something from the islands
maybe both. amazon for the bigger stuff and the shop for something special from hawaii
Those kids love getting packages from tia lucia in hawaii
just gotta make sure I ship by the 15th
mija como estas
tired
long day
ugh tomas
paloma texted me again this morning
kailua client contact thing
she keeps asking
and I dont know how to say no
Hermana is this the same girl who wanted the property manager number? How many times is that now
third time
every time more direct
today she just wrote did you get that kailua number
like im running errands for her
Mija you don't owe her anything. Those are company contacts, they're not yours to hand out
I know
but we work together every day
I dont want it to get weird
and shes not totally wrong
PG doesnt even do residential
Doesn't matter hermana. You share that number and it comes back on you not on her. What if the client says something to your boss
thats exactly what scares me. vernon would not let that go
Then you have your answer. Tell her you looked into it and the company policy doesn't allow it. Blame the policy
ya I guess
its just hard
we get along fine otherwise
I dont want her thinking im being difficult
Pues better she thinks youre difficult than you get in trouble for giving out a clients personal number. You've been there 12 years hermana, she's been there 2
ordered all the gifts for the kids
Which ones
pottery kit for sofia, basketball for diego, drawing kit for camila from amazon
and I went to king street gallery today for the sketchbook
The one with the Hawaiian art?
ya protea flower print on the cover. its so pretty tomas
also got chocolate macadamias and little hawaiian ornaments for their stockings
See this is why they love you. You don't just send something, you send hawaii
the only aunt lol
This is why the estate thing matters hermana. They're good kids
tomas
im buying christmas presents. dont start with the estate stuff
I'm not pushing mija. Just saying you care about these kids and whatever you decide, that's what matters
I know. I just still dont know what im doing with the split
You don't have to know yet hermana
ok can we go back to christmas
Si hermana. Ship them wrapped. Rosa will put them under the tree
good call
tomas are you up
Si hermana what's going on
marisol sent me a beneficiary form today
Ok and how does it look
she filled it in already
all three of rosas kids
Ah. She just assumed it all goes to the kids
equal split
like it was already decided
exactly
she just assumes it all goes to the kids
Mija you don't have to tell her anything yet. This is your decision not hers
I havent told her about the humane society thing
I know
but now theres a form with their names on it
You're not taking anything away hermana. It's your money. Ernesto left it to you and you can leave it to whoever you want
feels like its getting real
like if I change anything im taking money away from the kids
the humane society gave me mr whiskers
they were there for me after ernesto passed
I needed something to come home to
I want to give back
Pues then give back. You can split it however you want. Leave some to the kids and some to the humane society. Nobody says it has to be all or nothing hermana
mele kalikimaka
feliz navidad hermana
happy new year
felicidades 🥂
ugh tomas my kitchen faucet is broken
been dripping since new years and its driving me crazy
How bad is it hermana, dripping or full on running
constant drip. I put a towel under it but it soaks through by morning
I emailed the landlord monday
he just got back to me today
plumber coming friday
Pues at least he's sending someone. Some landlords would tell you to put a bucket under it and call it fixed
lol dont give him ideas
Remember when my bathroom pipe burst at the old place on Cherokee? Took the landlord two weeks to send somebody. I had a swimming pool in the bathroom by then
haha I remember that. you called me at like 2am freaking out
Ay dios that was a disaster. At least yours is just a drip ya sabes
ya but its so annoying
drip drip drip all night
😂 he probably thinks you installed a water fountain for him
mr whiskers keeps staring at it
like its a show lol
he actually tried to drink from it
That cat is something else hermana
anyway plumber is friday at 10. I took teh morning off
Good. Make sure they check under the sink too, old pipes in these buildings can have more going on than just the faucet
great now im worried its something bigger
Mija im not trying to scare you. I do building maintenance for a living, most of the time its just a washer. But doesnt hurt to ask
ok ill tell them to look. $1550 a month I better get working plumbing
Amen to that hermana
morning hermanito
marisol found me an estate attorney in san diego. cheaper than anything here
San Diego? Hermana you should come visit then! Who is the attorney
ricardo medina
small estate planning, wills and trusts
office on india street downtown
marisol says first consult is free
Mija that’s perfect. You come out here, we do the attorney meeting, and then you stay a few days. I’ll cook
that sounds really good
I need to figure out dates
and talk to vernon about time off
thinking february
February works. Just let me know when and I’ll clear my schedule. The guest room is yours hermana
ok let me look at flights this week. I cant believe im actually doing this
You’re doing the right thing hermana. And you’ll have me there with you for the meeting. We’ll figure out the beneficiary stuff together
soup tonight
lazy day
Hermana I called Ricardo Medina’s office today. He can see you February 14 at 10 in the morning
valentines day lol
Pues at least you’ll be spending it with a lawyer and your brother 😂
haha ok that works. what day should I fly in
Come the 13th if you can. That way you get a good night sleep here and we go to the meeting fresh friday morning
could I stay through the weekend? its been so long since ive been out there
Mija you stay as long as you want. The guest room is always yours ya sabes
maybe through the 17th? fly back tuesday
Perfect. We do the attorney meeting friday, I cook dinner that night. Saturday balboa park and old town, sunday the waterfront
that sounds so good tomas
It’ll be good for you hermana. Get away from work for a few days
you have no idea
ok im going to look at flights. hawaiian airlines does HNL to SAN right
Si they fly direct. Check those first
booked it
hawaiian airlines feb 13 to feb 17 direct both ways
That’s what I like to hear hermana! Send me the flight times when you get the confirmation
will do
havent told vernon yet btw
You need to tell him mija. Don’t wait too long on that
I know. ill figure it out this week
put together an itinerary for the trip
attorney friday morning
dinner at your place
saturday balboa and old town
sunday seaport village
Sounds perfect hermana. I’m making carne asada friday night, no arguments
zero arguments from me
checked the weather too. highs around 65 partly cloudy. beats the humidity here
hey did the bank transfer today
moved 600 from savings to checking for the sd trip
Good hermana. You'll need spending money down here
ya for food and ubers and stuff
flights already paid and im staying with u so should be plenty
More than enough mija. Friday dinner is on me and I'll drive you to Ricardo's office
I know
just felt weird moving money out of that account tho
Which account
the savings. ernestos insurance money
I know its mine now but it still feels like his ya know
Hermana that money was for you. That's why he had the policy. He wanted you taken care of
And this trip is partly about getting the estate sorted out. He would want you doing exactly this mija
ya
theres still about 28 thousand in there
I think about that number all the time tomas
Pues that's what the attorney is for mija. Once Ricardo helps you get the will done you can stop carrying all of it around in your head
ur right. ok done talking about money
Deal. How's Mr Whiskers
tomas
something is wrong with mr whiskers
What's going on hermana
he wont eat. like at all
its been two days. he sniffs the bowl and walks away
Two days? That's not like him. He usually eats everything you put down
I know thats why im freaking out
hes still playing and drinking water and everything. he seems fine otherwise
he just wont eat the food
Pues he might just be bored with it mija. How long has he been on that same food
since I got him. same brand same flavor for like 3 years
Hermana there's your answer. Even cats get tired of eating the same thing every day ya sabes
u think thats all it is
Could be. Try getting a few different kinds and see what he goes for. If he still won't eat after another day or two then call the vet
ya im gonna order some different stuff from petco. different flavors and brands
Good idea. Let him pick
I just hate seeing him not eat. he looks at me like im teh problem
😂 he probably thinks you're supposed to read his mind. He'll be fine hermana
tomas
vernon sent an email today about needing extra crew coverage mid february at turtle bay
the exact same week im going to be in san diego
Hermana have you told him yet
no
Mija the trip is in 8 days. You need to put in for that time off
I know I know. ill do it this week
ok
thx
added some restaurants to the SD itinerary
Like what
a place in gaslamp for saturday night and somewhere by the waterfront for sunday lunch
still havent told vernon
Hermana. Three days.
tomas update on mr whiskers
How's the little guy
HES EATING AGAIN
the petco stuff came yesterday and I tried the salmon one first
he literally attacked it tomas. whole bowl gone in like 5 minutes
😂 see I told you he was just bored hermana
I tried 4 different kinds. chicken he wouldnt even touch. turkey he sniffed and left
the beef he ate a little bit. but the salmon oh my god
Pues the cat has expensive taste
lol its not that much more
I just ordered a big bag
from petco
Good. I'm glad he's eating again mija. I know you were worried
I was SO worried. like what if hes sick what if the vet missed somethng
He's not sick hermana. He's a cat who knows what he wants
turns out thats salmon lol
Mr Whiskers living his best life ya sabes
hes on my lap right now purring like crazy. full belly finally
That's all that matters hermana
home safe
mr whiskers ignored me lol
ok tomas I need help
What's going on hermana
I need mamas tamale recipe. the pork ones
Ay dios which pork ones, the christmas ones or the party ones
the christmas ones. with the guajillo chiles
Ok pues those are my favorite too. Let me think
So the masa she used lard not shortening. You know that right
ya I know that part. its teh filling I always mess up
Ok so you take the pork shoulder and braise it for like 3 hours with the chiles and garlic. She always said low and slow
what chiles exactly
Guajillo and ancho. Maybe 6 guajillo and 3 ancho for a big batch. Toast them first before soaking ya sabes
ok thats way more than I used last time
Pues that's probably why yours were bland hermana 😂
lol rude but fair
And don't forget to mix some of the braising liquid into the shredded meat. That keeps it moist
ok got it. lard for masa, more chiles, braising liquid in teh filling
What's the occasion mija
volunteered to bring tamales to a potluck tmrw lol
Mija you volunteered to make tamales in ONE NIGHT 😂
I know I know
You're just like mama. She would agree to make 100 tamales and then be in the kitchen until 2am complaining the whole time
lol thats literally what im about to do
Send me a picture when they're done. I want to see if they look like hers
ok deal
De nada hermana. Give Mr Whiskers a scratch for me
will do. thanks hermanito
ya ya
gracias
tomas you up
Si hermana just got back from walking the dog. Whats going on
ok so the basketball tournament is march 14. the one ive been talking about all season
vernon emailed sunday
needs my crew saturday march 14
turtle bay makeup work
same exact day as the tournament
Ay dios mija the tournament you've been talking about all season? And Vernon wants you working that Saturday?
ya 7am to 2:30. my crew specifically because we know the turtle bay grounds
I dont want to tell him about the tournament
dont want him knowing what I do on weekends
he already acts like he owns my schedule mon-fri

Hermana you dont owe him an explanation. You just say you have a prior commitment that you cant move. Thats it. He doesnt get to know what you do on your Saturdays ya sabes. You've given that company 12 years of your life and one Saturday off for something that matters to you is not a crime
I know
I just hate that feeling
of having to justify my time off
to this man

I know you do. But thats HIS problem not yours. If he gets annoyed thats because he thinks your time belongs to him and it doesnt. Send the email tomorrow morning. Prior commitment no details. Keep it short
ok ya thats what im gonna do. probably suggest paloma's crew covers it

Smart hermana. Shows you're still thinking about the work even when you cant be there. Vernon will have to accept it. And the tournament matters to you. You had a great season. Dont let him take that away
he wouldnt even understand. he thinks landscaping is my whole life
Pues let him think whatever he wants. You know who you are mija. A crew leader AND the best outside shooter over fifty in Honolulu. Vernon doesnt get a vote on how you spend your Saturdays
lol thanks hermanito
De nada hermana. Go win that first round for me
haha gracias hermanito
k
will think about it
hermana did you ever follow up with Ricardo after the trip? also have you thought more about the humane society split? no rush just wondering
omw
keoni I swear
you know what vernon did today
lol what now
he wants me to write a report
on my own crew brah
wait like a formal thing??
ive been doing this 12 years
yes a team capacity overview. hours worked, overtime, who covers which sites, scheduling gaps
I already know all of this!! its my crew!!
brah thats just new boss stuff
he tryna look good for whoever promoted him
and the email had numbered action items. like im a new hire who needs instructions
🤙 classic
he was in commercial three months ago
and now hes telling me
just do it and move on. not worth teh fight
how to document my own work
I know. its just exhausting. every week something new with this guy
shoots at least he shows up 😂 ur old boss was way worse
haha ok fair point. im done venting. hows the pool deck
shoots 🤙
too vog
maybe sat
k
just got back from the vet with mr whiskers
how is he
hes good. 6 years old and the vet said everything looks great
all his shots updated
nice 🤙 thats a good cat
he was NOT happy about teh carrier tho
lol
hey random question. you know anyone who does cat sitting
like when u travel?
ya. thinking about taking a trip eventually and I need someone to watch him
my neighbor grace does that. mostly dogs but she loves cats
oh that would be great
ill get u her number. shes super reliable
thanks keoni
np 🤙 where u going
not sure yet. just thinking about it
shoots lmk
how u feeling
better. ty
5 min late sorry
hey u down to ride tmrw morning
north shore loop, haleiwa to sunset beach and back
how far is that
like 12 miles round trip
ok ya im in
nice 🤙 meet at haleiwa beach park 7am
should I check the weather first
ya but forecast looks clean
btw u still thinking abt that charity ride in jan
the kaena point one? idk keoni thats 40 miles
we train up to it! tmrw is ride 1
lol ok coach
shoots see u at 7 🚴
solid first ride 🤙
that was actually fun
told u! next week we go farther
same time tmrw?
ya 7am
going longer this time. 15 miles 🤙
ok but if I die its ur fault
15 miles done!!
thats what im talking abt 🚴
omw
18 miles tmrw lets goooo
ur trying to kill me
lol u said the same thing last week and u crushed it
fine. 7am
18 miles. im dead but I did it
ur ready for the 40 brah
lets not get ahead of ourselves lol
did u get ur fitbit year in review
ya looked at mine yesterday
apparently I walked 3 million steps lol
nice haha. look at my cycling stats
46 miles in december alone from our training rides
brah 🚴🤙
thats sick
it shows all our saturday rides going up. 12 then 15 then 18
told u the training would pay off
and the charity ride from february is on there too
that charity ride was legit! we doing it again this year?
we literally signed up for the big one on the 25th lol
ya but like after that too. we should do more events
lets survive kaena point first
fair 😂
247 miles total for the year on the bike
wait seriously?? thats insane
next year we hit 300 🚴
u and ur goals lol
🤙 new years resolution right there
k
RIDE DAY 🤙🤙🤙
im up
weather looks perfect brah
I checked. clear skies no wind
we got this
nervous. 40 miles is a lot
dont think abt 40. just ride
ok ok
haleiwa parking lot 7?
ya omw soon
28 miles brah!! shoots!! 🤙🤙
I cant believe I made it that far
u killed it out there
my legs are destroyed lol
that hill at mile 22 tho 😂
dont even. my heart rate was insane
but u pushed thru it
ya until mile 28 when my body said nope
28 out of 40 first try thats amazing
thanks keoni. seriously I wouldnt have done any of this without u pushing me
next year we do the full 40 🚴
haha ok one thing at a time
hey so you know what was kinda nice today
what
vernon let me handle the whole turtle bay schedule this week without checking on it
no email, no numbered list, nothing
see 🤙
told u he’d chill out
hes getting better I guess
still does the cc thing
progress brah
but the schedule stuff is way less annoying now
u up
ya
hey keoni
so terrence is doing a potluck for the basketball league before the tournament
oh nice when
march 1st at makiki park. 4pm
he said bring whoever so u should come
im not even on the team lol
doesnt matter its just food and hanging out
shoots im down 🤙
yay ok
what u bringing
thinking tamales maybe
oh man yes
ur tamales are so good
lol ok guess its tamales then
parking lot
fun ride
thx brah
keoni
sup
u know the tournament march 14 right
ya first round. kaimuki right
vernon emailed the crew saying he needs us saturday march 14 for turtle bay
the same exact day
brah no way
and he wants my crew specifically because we know the turtle bay grounds
did u tell him u cant
not yet. trying to figure out how to say it without making it a whole thing
just say u have plans. u dont owe him details
I know but its like he doesnt know I have a life outside this job
thats not ur problem. u been there 12 yrs u get to have a saturday 🤙
ya ur right. im gonna email him tmrw and just say prior commitment
good. dont over explain. go win that game sat 🤙
thanks K 🤙
hey how are you doing. you seemed really tired on our ride. the vog this week is brutal. you should at least ask about getting different site assignments when the air is this bad
rough one today
breathing weird
here
On the court at 6:30!
here
parking
running 5 late
parking
omw
omw
running late
Hey team! We're doing a potluck at Makiki Park before the end of season tournament. Sunday March 1st, 4 PM. Bring a dish and your friends. I'll handle drinks and plates 🏀
shoots count me in. ill bring poke
yesss im in
sounds fun
ill be there
Great start! Let me know what you're each bringing so we get a good spread.
fried rice
chicken katsu prob
not sure yet ill let u know
poke already called it lol
Looking good. More the merrier so feel free to invite people!
Great turnout today everyone! Thank you for making it happen. Those tamales were the hit of the afternoon 🏀
lucia those tamales were unreal
seriously. I need that recipe
haha thanks yall. family recipe
everything was good. needed that before tournament
This is exactly why I love this league. Good food, good people. See you all at the tournament!
cant wait 🏀
lets gooo

Hey team! Bracket is set for the end of season tournament. 8 teams this year! First round games are Saturday March 14 at 10 AM. We're matched up against Kaimuki. If we advance, semifinal is 2 PM same day. Finals March 21 at 11 AM. Let's finish strong! 🏀
kaimuki? we got this
yesss lets go
oh its on
ready
That's the energy I like to hear. Practice Thursday as usual, we'll go over the game plan. Bring water and your A game!
here
hey lucia. did you hear that banging last night from upstairs
omg yes. went on til like midnight
im going to email the building manager. want me to include your name
hey lucia! long time. hope the new gig is treating you good
hey danny! its been a while. ya doing good. how about you
hi lucia! the hawaiian humane society adoption fair is october 18. we need afternoon volunteers. you in?
yes! sign me up
great! 12 to 4pm at kapiolani park. ill add you to the list
hi lucia. refrigerator fan is all fixed. replaced the motor. should be quiet now
thanks so much chris. sounds way better already
hey lucia! community garden seed swap is april 12 at makiki park
oh nice. ill try to come by
i have extra basil and mint starts if you want some for your lanai
truck loaded
thx
Hi team. Schedule change for Monday: Ko Olina AM, Turtle Bay PM. Revised assignments to follow.
got it
What about the Kailua property.
Kailua moved to Wednesday. Updated schedule coming shortly.
ok
heading to ko olina
on site
on site
Reminder: crew meeting Friday 7 AM before heading to sites. Please be on time.
will be there
Ok.
late, traffic
truck has flat
ugh ok
taking the bus
Good work on the Ko Olina property last week. Client was very pleased with the trimming.
shoots
thanks
k
turtle bay today
see you there
on it
meeting at the usual
k
k
omw
who riding tmrw 🚴
im in. where we going
diamond head loop
what time
6:30 at kapiolani park
in
shoots
rolling out 6
good ride today 🤙
yessah 🚴
cant. work
big ride tmrw yall. north shore charity ride. haleiwa beach park 6am
how many miles
40 if we do the full loop
im doing as much as I can lol
same
omw
in
Hey familia! Happy holidays to my two favorite people 💛
Feliz navidad prima. How's the office treating you
Busy! End of year filings. Lucia how is Mr. Whiskers?
hes good. spoiled as always lol
That cat is living his best life ya sabes
Haha love it. Te quiero both of you 💛
Kapiolani Dental: Reminder - Your cleaning appt with Dr. Yamamoto is March 10 at 3:00 PM. Reply Y to confirm or call (808) 555-2234 to reschedule.
Y
Longs Drugs Ala Moana: Your prescription is ready for pickup. Rx#4478291. Questions? Call (808) 555-1890.
FedEx: Your package has been delivered to front desk at 1534 Liholiho St. Tracking: 789244013856
T-Mobile: Your payment of $55.00 has been received. Thank you!
FHB Fraud Alert: Did you authorize a charge of $127.43 at Petco.com on 02/08? Reply YES or NO.
YES
Petco: Your order #8829104 has shipped! Estimated delivery Feb 10-12.
VCA Kaneohe: Reminder - Mr. Whiskers appt Nov 8 at 2:00 PM. Arrive 10 min early. Call (808) 555-4490 to reschedule.
confirmed thanks
Netflix: Your monthly payment of $15.00 was processed. Enjoy streaming!
Hi Lucia! This is Brenda with Pacific Realty. Thinking about selling in Honolulu? Rates are great right now! Reply STOP to opt out.
HSFCU: You've earned 2,847 rewards pts on your Visa! Redeem at hsfcu.org/rewards. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
Go solar with Aloha Solar! Honolulu homeowners save up to $200/mo. Free estimate at 808-555-7700. STOP to opt out.
You good for tonight?
on my way
Hey Lucia! Happy new year. Great game last Thursday 🏀 Your three-pointer in the fourth was something else!
haha thanks coach. happy new year to you too
Hey Lucia, just checking in. Hope you had a good weekend!
thanks coach! good weekend. see you Thursday
See you at 6:30!
here
Hey Lucia , checking in about Saturday. Vog forecast says it's going to be thick all weekend. Just want to make sure you're good for the tournament. Let me know if anything changes
hey prima, did u see my email 💛
ya tomorrow
how was the ride?
good. tired lol
